name: Beatrice's Catalyst
availability: Found in Valley of Drakes after killing The Four Kings .
special notes: Stats are identical with Sorcerer's Catalyst .

name: Demon's Catalyst
availability: Dropped by Demon Firesage .

name: Izalith Catalyst
availability: Dropped by the Daughter of Chaos .
special notes: Identical MagAdjust with Beatrice's Catalyst and Sorcerer's Catalyst while having higher durability.

name: Logan's Catalyst
availability: Found in The Duke's Archives after killing the insane Big Hat Logan .
special notes: Highest MagAdjust after 40 INT , without halving spell usage.

name: Manus Catalyst
availability: Ascend any other catalyst with Soul of Manus .
special notes: Halves spell usage. Secondary attack is axe 's overhead smash.

name: Oolacile Catalyst
availability: Dropped by Bloathead Sorcerer .
special notes: Fixed MagAdjust, doesn't scale with any attributes. Poison buildup with each melee hit.

name: Oolacile Ivory Catalyst
availability: Sold by Dusk of Oolacile for 1,000 souls. Sold by Elizabeth for 1,000 souls.
special notes: Fixed MagAdjust, doesn't scale with any attributes.

name: Sorcerer's Catalyst
availability: Sorcerer starting equipment. Found in Lower Undead Burg . Sold by Griggs of Vinheim for 500 souls. Sold by Rickert of Vinheim for 500 souls.
special notes: Stats are identical to Beatrice's Catalyst .

name: Tin Banishment Catalyst
availability: Found in Blighttown .

name: Tin Crystallization Catalyst
availability: Dropped by the insane Big Hat Logan in The Duke's Archives .

availability: Ascend any other catalyst with Soul of Gwyndolin .
special notes: Scales with Faith rather than Intelligence .
